tasks.subject: feature-promo-system [P2] Integrate PromoSlot into DashboardPage and DashboardSidebar
tasks.description:
Add PromoSlot integration to the two dashboard placement points. ## File: `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/dashboard/ui/DashboardPage.tsx` Add one import and one line after `NeedsAttentionSection`: ```tsx import { PromoSlot } from '@/layers/features/feature-promos'; ``` Inside the section stack, after ``: ```tsx ``` The full return becomes: ```tsx
``` ## File: `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-sidebar/ui/DashboardSidebar.tsx` Add one import and place PromoSlot below the Recent Agents section: ```tsx import { PromoSlot } from '@/layers/features/feature-promos'; ``` Inside ``, after the existing `recentCwds.length > 0` block: ```tsx {recentCwds.length > 0 && ( Recent Agents {recentCwds.slice(0, MAX_RECENT_AGENTS).map((recent) => ( navigate({ to: '/session', search: { dir: recent.path } })} /> ))} )} ``` ## Integration Notes - DashboardPage is in `widgets/` layer — it can import from `features/` per FSD rules - DashboardSidebar is in `features/` layer — `feature-promos` is a sibling feature. Per FSD cross-module rules, UI composition across features is ALLOWED. A feature's UI component may render a sibling feature's component for composition purposes. - PromoSlot renders zero DOM when no promos qualify, so there's no visual impact when the system is empty - The `space-y-6` / `space-y-8` gap in DashboardPage naturally spaces the PromoSlot section ## Acceptance Criteria - PromoSlot appears after NeedsAttentionSection in DashboardPage - PromoSlot appears below Recent Agents in DashboardSidebar - When no promos qualify, zero DOM is rendered (no empty sections or whitespace) - Dashboard layout spacing is maintained (`space-y-6` / `space-y-8`) - `pnpm typecheck` passes - FSD import rules are not violated

tasks.subject: feature-promo-system [P2] Add Settings toggle for feature suggestions
tasks.description:
Add a "Feature suggestions" toggle to the Preferences tab in SettingsDialog.

## File: `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/ui/SettingsDialog.tsx`

### 1. Add `promoEnabled` and `setPromoEnabled` to the destructured app store

Update the existing `useAppStore()` destructuring (around line 64-86) to include:

```typescript
const {
  // ... existing destructured fields ...
  promoEnabled,
  setPromoEnabled,
} = useAppStore();
```

### 2. Add SettingRow in the Preferences panel

Add this after the existing "Pulse run notifications" SettingRow and before the "Show dev tools" SettingRow (around line 279-291):

```tsx
<SettingRow
  label="Feature suggestions"
  description="Show feature discovery cards on the dashboard and sidebar"
>
  <Switch checked={promoEnabled} onCheckedChange={setPromoEnabled} />
</SettingRow>
```

The full Preferences panel FieldCardContent section becomes:

```tsx
<FieldCardContent>
  <SettingRow label="Show timestamps" description="Display message timestamps in chat">
    <Switch checked={showTimestamps} onCheckedChange={setShowTimestamps} />
  </SettingRow>
  {/* ... existing rows ... */}
  <SettingRow
    label="Pulse run notifications"
    description="Show a toast when a scheduled Pulse run completes"
  >
    <Switch checked={enablePulseNotifications} onCheckedChange={setEnablePulseNotifications} />
  </SettingRow>
  <SettingRow
    label="Feature suggestions"
    description="Show feature discovery cards on the dashboard and sidebar"
  >
    <Switch checked={promoEnabled} onCheckedChange={setPromoEnabled} />
  </SettingRow>
  <SettingRow label="Show dev tools" description="Enable developer tools panel">
    <Switch checked={devtoolsOpen} onCheckedChange={() => toggleDevtools()} />
  </SettingRow>
</FieldCardContent>
```

### 3. Update `features/settings/__tests__/SettingsDialog.test.tsx`

Add a test case for the new setting. In the mock app store, add `promoEnabled: true` and `setPromoEnabled: vi.fn()` to the mock state. Then:

```typescript
it('renders Feature suggestions toggle in Preferences tab', async () => {
  // Navigate to Preferences tab and verify the toggle is present
  render(<SettingsDialog open={true} onOpenChange={vi.fn()} />, { wrapper: Wrapper });
  // Click Preferences tab
  const preferencesTab = screen.getByText('Preferences');
  await userEvent.click(preferencesTab);
  expect(screen.getByText('Feature suggestions')).toBeInTheDocument();
  expect(screen.getByText('Show feature discovery cards on the dashboard and sidebar')).toBeInTheDocument();
});
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- "Feature suggestions" toggle appears in the Preferences tab of SettingsDialog
- Toggle is between "Pulse run notifications" and "Show dev tools"
- Toggle reads `promoEnabled` from app store and calls `setPromoEnabled` on change
- Label is "Feature suggestions", description is "Show feature discovery cards on the dashboard and sidebar"
- Existing SettingsDialog tests pass
- New test verifies the toggle renders correctly
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Adding feature suggestions toggle to Settings dialog

tasks.subject: feature-promo-system [P3] Create dialog content components
tasks.description:
Create the four dialog content components for the initial promo set. Each receives `PromoDialogProps` (`{ onClose }`) and can import from entities/shared per FSD rules. ## File: `ui/dialogs/RemoteAccessDialog.tsx` ```tsx import { Globe, Smartphone, Laptop } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; import type { PromoDialogProps } from '../../model/promo-types'; /** Dialog content for the Remote Access promo. */ export function RemoteAccessDialog({ onClose }: PromoDialogProps) { return (

Access your agents from anywhere

Phone, tablet, or another computer

Mobile access

Check on your agents while away from your desk

Multi-device

Same sessions, same state, any browser

Enable remote access in Settings → Server to expose DorkOS on your network or via a secure tunnel.

); } ``` ## File: `ui/dialogs/RelayAdaptersDialog.tsx` ```tsx import { MessageSquare, Bell, Zap } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; import { useAppStore } from '@/layers/shared/model'; import type { PromoDialogProps } from '../../model/promo-types'; /** Dialog content for the Relay Adapters promo. */ export function RelayAdaptersDialog({ onClose }: PromoDialogProps) { const setRelayOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setRelayOpen); const handleSetUp = () => { onClose(); setRelayOpen(true); }; return (

Get notified where you already are

Slack, Telegram, and more

Real-time notifications

Know when agents finish, fail, or need input

Two-way communication

Reply to agents directly from your messaging app

); } ``` ## File: `ui/dialogs/SchedulesDialog.tsx` ```tsx import { Moon, Repeat, Clock } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; import { useAppStore } from '@/layers/shared/model'; import type { PromoDialogProps } from '../../model/promo-types'; /** Dialog content for the Schedules promo. */ export function SchedulesDialog({ onClose }: PromoDialogProps) { const setPulseOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setPulseOpen); const handleSetUp = () => { onClose(); setPulseOpen(true); }; return (

Agents that work while you sleep

Schedule recurring tasks with Pulse

Cron-style schedules

Run agents on any schedule — daily, hourly, or custom cron

Wake up to results

Review completed work in the morning, not start it

); } ``` ## File: `ui/dialogs/AgentChatDialog.tsx` ```tsx import { MessagesSquare, Users, Network } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; import { useAppStore } from '@/layers/shared/model'; import type { PromoDialogProps } from '../../model/promo-types'; /** Dialog content for the Agent-to-Agent Chat promo. */ export function AgentChatDialog({ onClose }: PromoDialogProps) { const setMeshOpen = useAppStore((s) => s.setMeshOpen); const handleExplore = () => { onClose(); setMeshOpen(true); }; return (

Let your agents collaborate

Agent-to-agent communication via Mesh

Multi-agent workflows

Agents can delegate tasks and share context

Topology view

Visualize how your agents connect and communicate

); } ``` ## Design Notes - Each dialog follows a consistent visual pattern: icon block with gradient, title/subtitle, feature benefit rows with icons, and CTA buttons - All copy is benefit-first ("Agents that work while you sleep") not feature-first ("Pulse scheduling system") - CTAs navigate to the relevant feature dialog (Relay, Pulse, Mesh) via the app store - Dismiss/secondary buttons use `variant="ghost"`, primary CTAs use default variant - All dialogs import only from `@/layers/shared/ui` and `@/layers/shared/model` per FSD rules ## Acceptance Criteria - All four dialog components render without errors - Each receives `{ onClose }` and calls it correctly - Benefit-first copy in all dialogs (not feature-first) - Primary CTAs open the relevant feature dialog (Relay, Pulse, Mesh) - All imports follow FSD layer rules - `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Creating four dialog content components for initial promos

tasks.subject: feature-promo-system [P3] Populate promo registry with initial entries
tasks.description:
Populate `PROMO_REGISTRY` with the four initial promo definitions. This task depends on both the type system (1.1) and dialog components (3.1).

## File: `model/promo-registry.ts`

Replace the empty array with the full registry:

```typescript
import { Globe, MessageSquare, Moon, MessagesSquare } from 'lucide-react';
import type { PromoDefinition } from './promo-types';
import { RemoteAccessDialog } from '../ui/dialogs/RemoteAccessDialog';
import { RelayAdaptersDialog } from '../ui/dialogs/RelayAdaptersDialog';
import { SchedulesDialog } from '../ui/dialogs/SchedulesDialog';
import { AgentChatDialog } from '../ui/dialogs/AgentChatDialog';

/**
 * Central registry of all feature promos.
 * Adding a new promo is: add an entry here + (optionally) write a dialog content component.
 *
 * Priority ordering rationale:
 * - Remote Access (90): drives daily engagement
 * - Relay Adapters (80): drives retention through notifications
 * - Schedules (70): unlocks autonomous operation
 * - Agent Chat (60): advanced/power-user territory
 */
export const PROMO_REGISTRY: PromoDefinition[] = [
  {
    id: 'remote-access',
    placements: ['dashboard-main', 'dashboard-sidebar'],
    priority: 90,
    shouldShow: () => true,
    content: {
      icon: Globe,
      title: 'Use DorkOS on the go',
      shortDescription: 'Access your agents from anywhere',
      ctaLabel: 'Learn more',
    },
    action: { type: 'dialog', component: RemoteAccessDialog },
  },
  {
    id: 'relay-adapters',
    placements: ['dashboard-main', 'agent-sidebar', 'dashboard-sidebar'],
    priority: 80,
    shouldShow: (ctx) => ctx.isRelayEnabled && !ctx.hasAdapter('slack') && !ctx.hasAdapter('telegram'),
    content: {
      icon: MessageSquare,
      title: 'Connect to Slack & Telegram',
      shortDescription: 'Get notifications where you already are',
      ctaLabel: 'Learn more',
    },
    action: { type: 'dialog', component: RelayAdaptersDialog },
  },
  {
    id: 'schedules',
    placements: ['dashboard-main', 'agent-sidebar', 'dashboard-sidebar'],
    priority: 70,
    shouldShow: (ctx) => ctx.isPulseEnabled && ctx.sessionCount > 0,
    content: {
      icon: Moon,
      title: 'Run agents while you sleep',
      shortDescription: 'Set schedules and wake up to results',
      ctaLabel: 'Set up',
    },
    action: { type: 'dialog', component: SchedulesDialog },
  },
  {
    id: 'agent-chat',
    placements: ['dashboard-main', 'agent-sidebar'],
    priority: 60,
    shouldShow: (ctx) => ctx.isMeshEnabled && ctx.agentCount >= 2,
    content: {
      icon: MessagesSquare,
      title: 'Agent-to-agent conversations',
      shortDescription: 'Let your agents collaborate',
      ctaLabel: 'Learn more',
    },
    action: { type: 'dialog', component: AgentChatDialog },
  },
];
```

## Registry Details

| ID | Priority | Placements | Condition |
|---|---|---|---|
| `remote-access` | 90 | dashboard-main, dashboard-sidebar | Always show |
| `relay-adapters` | 80 | dashboard-main, agent-sidebar, dashboard-sidebar | Relay enabled AND no Slack AND no Telegram adapter |
| `schedules` | 70 | dashboard-main, agent-sidebar, dashboard-sidebar | Pulse enabled AND at least 1 session |
| `agent-chat` | 60 | dashboard-main, agent-sidebar | Mesh enabled AND 2+ agents |

## Acceptance Criteria

- Registry contains exactly 4 entries with the specified IDs, priorities, placements, and conditions
- All promo IDs are unique and kebab-case
- All priorities are within 0-100 range
- All `type: 'dialog'` actions reference valid dialog components
- `shouldShow` functions use only `PromoContext` properties (no side effects)
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Populating promo registry with four initial promo entries

tasks.subject: feature-promo-system [P4] Update barrel exports and run full validation
tasks.description:
Final integration task: ensure all barrel exports are correct, all imports resolve, all tests pass, and the typecheck is clean.

## Tasks

### 1. Verify barrel file at `features/feature-promos/index.ts`

Ensure the barrel exports all public API items:

```typescript
/**
 * Feature promos — declarative feature discovery cards.
 * Registry-driven system for contextually surfacing feature education.
 *
 * @module features/feature-promos
 */
export { PromoSlot } from './ui/PromoSlot';
export { usePromoSlot } from './model/use-promo-slot';
export { PROMO_REGISTRY } from './model/promo-registry';
export type {
  PromoDefinition,
  PromoPlacement,
  PromoAction,
  PromoDialogProps,
  PromoContent,
  PromoContext,
} from './model/promo-types';
```

### 2. Verify all integration points import from barrels

Check that DashboardPage, DashboardSidebar, SessionSidebar, and SettingsDialog all import from `@/layers/features/feature-promos` (the barrel), not from internal paths.

### 3. Run full validation suite

Execute the following commands and fix any issues:

```bash
# Type checking
pnpm typecheck

# All tests
pnpm vitest run

# Lint check
pnpm lint
```

### 4. Verify zero-DOM behavior

Manually verify (or add a test) that:
- `PromoSlot` renders nothing when `promoEnabled` is false
- `PromoSlot` renders nothing when all promos are dismissed
- `PromoSlot` renders nothing when no promos match the placement
- No empty containers, headers, or whitespace are left behind

### 5. Verify FSD layer compliance

Confirm no FSD layer violations:
- `features/feature-promos/model/` only imports from `entities/` and `shared/`
- `features/feature-promos/ui/` only imports from `entities/`, `shared/`, and own `model/`
- Dialog components in `ui/dialogs/` only import from `shared/` and own types
- No cross-feature model imports

### 6. Verify animation consistency

Confirm animations match existing dashboard patterns:
- Section entrance: fade + height, 200ms, cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)
- Card stagger: 40ms intervals, opacity 0/1 + y 12/0
- Card dismiss: opacity 0, scale 0.95, 150ms
- All animations respect `useReducedMotion()`

## Acceptance Criteria

- `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
- `pnpm vitest run` passes all tests (existing and new)
- `pnpm lint` passes with no new errors
- All imports use barrel paths
- FSD layer rules are not violated
- Zero DOM rendered when no promos qualify
- Animations are consistent with existing dashboard patterns
tasks.activeForm: Validating barrel exports, running full test suite, and checking integration
